summary: Live/Archive | Hearing Speed Changes while Rewinding
description:
GIVEN the user is watching a Live or Archive game
AND the TTS is enabled
AND the user is Rewinding

steps.action: WHEN the user changes the Rewind Speed
steps.result:
THEN the user will hear: “Rewinding <speed>"
For example: "Rewinding 2x, Fast Forwarding 4x, Fast Forwarding 8x, press select to play"
